name: Houston Credit Repair - Fix Your Credit Scores
description_short: Unable to verify: Houston Credit Repair's website is currently inaccessible (403 Forbidden error), preventing assessment of services, legitimacy, or operational status.
description_long: Houston Credit Repair claims to offer credit repair services targeting consumers in the Houston area based on its domain name and URL. The company positions itself within the 'fix-my-credit' category, which typically includes dispute services for credit report errors and negative items. However, a critical limitation prevents accurate profiling: the company's website (https://houston-credit-repair.com) is currently returning a 403 Forbidden error, making all company information inaccessible. This access restriction prevents verification of the company's actual services, credentials, years in operation, ownership structure, or specific service offerings. Without access to website content, pricing information, service details, or company claims, it is impossible to determine whether this is an active, legitimate business or a dormant/defunct domain. The 403 error suggests either intentional access restrictions, server misconfiguration, or lack of active website maintenance. For consumers considering this company, the inaccessibility of their website raises immediate red flags about operational legitimacy and ongoing business activity. Any consumer seeking credit repair should prioritize companies with transparent, accessible web presences and verifiable credentials from regulatory bodies like the FTC or state attorney general offices.
